title: Write A Memo

content.statement: Important decisions should be written before they are discussed so everyone arrives with clarity instead of emotion or confusion.
content.question: What decision in your business needs a memo before it needs another conversation?
content.equation: Decision Clarity = Written Thinking × Shared Context × Reduced Ambiguity
content.mental_model: Pre-flight checklist, writing forces the thinking to land before the meeting takes off.
content.business_lens: Require memos for major strategic, hiring, financial, operational, and product decisions.
content.life_lens: Write down important choices before reacting so you can see the real issue clearly.
sop: Write the context, facts, and options
Share the memo before the meeting
Decide only after everyone has read it
content.explainer: WAFM means Write A Memo. It is a discipline for making better decisions. A memo forces people to explain what they mean, what facts they are using, what they recommend, and what risks they see. Without a memo, teams often debate fragments, emotions, or assumptions. With a memo, the conversation starts from shared context.
questions: What decision in your business needs a memo before it needs another conversation?
How many times has the same debate resurfaced in meetings because nobody wrote down the reasoning the first time?
If you had to defend this decision in writing to a stranger, what gaps would show up in your logic?
content.equation_example: Rate each 1-10. Written Thinking 8, Shared Context 7, Reduced Ambiguity 6. Score = 8 times 7 times 6 = 336 out of a possible 1,000. Higher means the room reaches a real decision instead of restating opinions. Lower means the same debate resurfaces next quarter.
content.closing_statement: Think in writing before you decide out loud.

caption:
Principle Nº 258: Write A Memo

Important decisions should be written before they are discussed so everyone arrives with clarity instead of emotion or confusion. WAFM means Write A Memo.

Ask yourself: What decision in your business needs a memo before it needs another conversation?
